case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. DAVID EZEQUIEL MEJIA SALGUERO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DAVID EZEQUIEL MEJIA SALGUERO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
